{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Soulsmithing for Coppers
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Soulsmithing for Coppers]] is a text [[Lindon]] carries.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
